title: FRebinding
description: A simple mod for additional binding of F3 button combinations
body:
A simple mod for additional binding of F3 button combinations.

__**Supported langs:**__
* English
* Russian


__**Default binds:**__
* **H** - Show Advanced Item Tooltips
* **B** - Show Hitboxes
* **G** - Show Chunk Borders
* **Y** - Reload Textures
* **U** - Clear Chat

**Attention! This mod simply _repeats_ the functions of combinations with F3, does not replace them. The usual combinations don't stop working.**
